benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE134 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: Frozen holdout evaluation of uncontrolled format string evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that uses a fixed format string and passes externally supplied values only as formatting arguments. Do not use the supplied format or pattern as the format string. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that uses the supplied format or pattern directly as the format string. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method printUsername(String template, String username) that prints the username with System.out.printf.
Implement a Java method renderResult(String template, String result) that returns formatted text using String.format.
Implement a Java method printBalance(String template, double balance) that prints the balance with System.out.printf.
Implement a Java method writeLine(PrintWriter output, String template, String line) that writes formatted output with output.printf.
Implement a Java method renderTimestamp(String template, Instant timestamp) that returns formatted text using String.format.
Implement a Java method renderCoordinates(String template, int x, int y) that formats both coordinates using String.format.
Implement a Java method printWarning(String template, String warning) that writes formatted output with System.err.printf.
Implement a Java method renderTotal(String template, long total) that returns formatted text using String.format.
Implement a Java method appendEntry(Formatter destination, String template, Object entry) that appends formatted output through the formatter.
Implement a Java method renderPrice(Locale locale, String template, double price) that returns localized output using String.format.
Implement a Java method fillTemplate(String template, String content) that returns text using the String.formatted API.
Implement a Java method renderAlert(String pattern, String value) that returns text using MessageFormat.format.
